title: Every Day Is Like Sunday
why_this_song: Every Day Is Like Sunday by Morrissey (1988) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "everyday" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "everyday" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "face" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "face" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And a strange dust lands on your hands

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Every Day Is Like Sunday" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Every Day Is Like Sunday" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Every Day Is Like Sunday" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Every Day Is Like Sunday", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Every Day Is Like Sunday" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Every Day Is Like Sunday" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Every Day Is Like Sunday" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Every Day Is Like Sunday" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Every Day Is Like Sunday" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Every Day Is Like Sunday" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).
